versions.content: Thwart is a basic power. A player can exhaust their hero to thwart. When a hero thwarts, remove threat from a scheme equal to the hero's THW (thwart) value.

Tough is a status card given by the Toughness keyword or other card effects. A tough status card prevents the next instance of damage the character would take. Once the damage is prevented, the tough status card is discarded.
Treachery is an encounter card type. When a treachery is revealed, its 'When Revealed' abilities resolve immediately, and then the treachery is placed in the encounter discard pile.
